# Unsupervised contaminated user profile identification against shilling attack in recommender system

**Authors:** Fei Zhang et al.  
**Year:** 2024  
**URL:** https://journals.sagepub.com/doi/10.3233/IDA-230575  
**Evidence type:** Detection-method research

## Claim supported

Recommender systems remain susceptible to carefully crafted profile injection attacks.

## Key result

Proposes unsupervised profile-identification methods for attack profiles, including standard and obfuscated behaviour attacks.

## How it supports manufactured traction

This source strengthens the argument that digital systems can be moved by manipulated proxy signals. Use it as evidence for the mechanism, not as proof that every campaign succeeds.
